cards.back: A dataset of movie ratings from users, used for movie recommendation systems

cards.front: What is the purpose of the MapReduce program?
cards.back: To find the tags associated with each movie by analyzing the MovieLens data
A programming model used for processing large data sets in parallel across a cluster of computers

cards.front: What is the most common programming language used for MapReduce?
cards.back: Java (although Python and Scala are also used)

cards.front: What is the primary function of the Mapper in a MapReduce program?
cards.back: To split the input data into smaller chunks and process each chunk in parallel
